creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Make sure you use a update-to-date ports tree if you build from it.
I fixed the problem with commit [1]:
4671249405c05bb65dfec261eb645081ea72fdf5

and it was introduced by commit:
56e085ca55a831ab56e2e6b417bf230c827fd2e5

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=4671249405c05bb65dfec261eb645081ea72fdf5
